The '''Gyuel system''' was a star system in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. It contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Qoribu]] and its [[Moon/Legends|moons]], including [[Jwlio]], [[Eyyl]], [[Zvbo]], [[Ruu (moon)|Ruu]], [[Nrogu]], and [[Kr]].
